name: cross-in-shadows
prompt: Full body shot of tall woman in dark administrative corridor. Severe black bob haircut, vivid red lipstick standing out against shadows. Professional blazer and pencil skirt silhouette. Standing against wall, arms crossed, watching. Cold blue moonlight from window illuminating half her face. Noir atmosphere, dramatic shadows. Observing everything with sharp dark eyes. | anime style, modern anime aesthetic, clean linework, mature shading, dramatic noir lighting, dark blue grey color palette, high contrast, cel shading
bubble: Internal thought from Cross, full body shot with face visible, place thought bubble TOP-LEFT as internal monologue

sfx.description: cold wind through empty corridor, echoing footsteps fading
